contextBlurb: Tennessee's legislature is grappling with a surge of data center oversight proposals, with multiple bills (including HB2392 and SB2653) pushing for formal environmental and grid-impact review processes before new facilities can site — a notably proactive local-control approach. On AI, activity is narrower, with deepfake election legislation advancing in committee and a school-focused AI governance bill (HB0531) still in early stages. No AI or data center measures have been enacted yet, leaving significant policy questions unresolved as the session continues.
